2604.18882.title: Formally Verified Patent Analysis via Dependent Type Theory: Machine-Checkable Certificates from a Hybrid AI + Lean 4 Pipeline
2604.18882.paper_summary: We present a formally verified framework for patent analysis as a hybrid AI + Lean 4 pipeline. The DAG-coverage core (Algorithm 1b) is fully machine-verified once bounded match scores are fixed. Freedom-to-operate, claim-construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, and doctrine-of-equivalents analyses are formalized at the specification level with kernel-checked candidate certificates. Existing patent-analysis approaches rely on manual expert analysis (slow, non-scalable) or ML/NLP methods (probabilistic, opaque, non-compositional). To our knowledge, this is the first framework that applies interactive theorem proving based on dependent type theory to intellectual property analysis. Claims are encoded as DAGs in Lean 4, match strengths as elements of a verified complete lattice, and confidence scores propagate through dependencies via proven-correct monotone functions. We formalize five IP use cases (patent-to-product mapping, freedom-to-operate, claim construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, doctrine of equivalents) via six algorithms. Structural lemmas, the coverage-core generator, and the closed-path identity coverage = W_cov are machine-verified in Lean 4. Higher-level theorems for the other use cases remain informal proof sketches, and their proof-generation functions are architecturally mitigated (untrusted generators whose outputs are kernel-checked and sorry-free axiom-audited). Guarantees are conditional on the ML layer: they certify mathematical correctness of computations downstream of ML scores, not the accuracy of the scores themselves. A case study on a synthetic memory-module claim demonstrates weighted coverage and construction-sensitivity analysis. Validation against adjudicated cases is future work.
2604.18882.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一個正式驗證的專利分析框架，作為混合的 AI + Lean 4 流程。當固定匹配分數後，DAG 覆蓋核心（算法 1b）將完全由機器驗證。自由經營、權利要求建構敏感性、交叉權利要求一致性和等價原則分析在規範層面上以內核檢查的候選證書形式進行形式化。現有的專利分析方法依賴於手動專家分析（緩慢、不可擴展）或 ML/NLP 方法（概率性、不透明、非組合性）。據我們所知，這是第一個將基於依賴類型理論的互動定理證明應用於知識產權分析的框架。權利要求被編碼為 Lean 4 中的 DAG，匹配強度作為經過驗證的完整格的元素，信心分數通過經證明正確的單調函數在依賴關係中傳播。我們通過六個算法形式化了五個知識產權使用案例（專利到產品映射、自營權、權利要求建構敏感性、交叉權利要求一致性、等價原則）。結構引理、覆蓋核心生成器和閉合路徑身份覆蓋 = W_cov 在 Lean 4 中經過機器驗證。其他使用案例的高階定理仍然是非正式的證明草圖，其證明生成函數在架構上被減輕（不受信任的生成器，其輸出經過內核檢查且無錯誤的公理審計）。保證條件取決於 ML 層：它們證明了 ML 分數下游計算的數學正確性，而不是分數本身的準確性。對合成記憶模塊權利要求的案例研究展示了加權覆蓋和建構敏感性分析。對裁決案例的驗證是未來的工作。
2604.18882.author: George Koomullil et.al.
